nasb.text: And some tax collectors also came to be baptized, and they said to him, “Teacher, what shall we do?”

esv.text: Tax collectors also came to be baptized and said to him, “Teacher, what shall we do?”

cnv.text: 又有稅吏來要受洗，問他：“老師，我們當作甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 有些税吏也来受洗，并问约翰：“老师，我们该怎么办呢？”

csbs.text: 一些税吏也来受洗。他们问约翰：“老师，我们该做什么呢？”
